form.formComment: Comes off a (38.04) win last time, scoring by a head in a Class 0 over 650m at this track. Has two wins and four placings from eight starts from the draw. Makes plenty of appeal on that latest effort.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Manukau over 527m. Last start finished 2nd in a Class 5 on April 4 over 527m at Manukau behind Portland Fonzie beaten 1.5 lengths (31.25). Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Leading player.
